videos.headline: Snoop gives his sideline report for the Arizona Bowl
videos.description: Snoop Dogg joins the sideline to give his call breakdown for Miami and Colorado State.

tracking.trackingName: NCF_One-Play (Snoop gives his sideline report for the Arizona Bowl) 2024/12/28 ESHEET

videos.headline: Kevin Davis storms over to extend lead for Miami (OH)
videos.description: Kevin Davis tumbles into the end zone, scoring the first touchdown between Miami (OH) and Colorado State.

tracking.trackingName: NCF_One-Play (Kevin Davis storms over to extend lead for Miami (OH)) 2024/12/28 ESHEET

videos.headline: Brett Gabbert rushes for Miami (OH) TD after fake pass
videos.description: Brett Gabbert's run for 10 yards for Miami (OH)'s second touchdown of the evening.

tracking.trackingName: NCF_One-Play (Brett Gabbert rushes for Miami (OH) TD after fake pass) 2024/12/28 ESHEET

videos.headline: Snoop Dogg has a blast in the booth after Miami (OH)'s 4th TD
videos.description: Jordan Brunson brings the Dogg out of Snoop as he barrels in for the 2-yard touchdown.

tracking.trackingName: NCF_One-Play (Snoop Dogg has a blast in the booth after Miami (OH)'s 4th TD) 2024/12/28 ESHEET
